Interface Storable

All Known Implementing Classes:
Account, CreditCard, VaultObject
public interface Storable
Represents an entity that contains one or more secrets which can be encrypted and decrypted using an VaultEncryptingStrategy.

Implementations decide which fields are considered secret and how they are transformed internally (for example, storing an encrypted password as Base64).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    decrypt(VaultEncryptingStrategy encryptingStrategy)
    Decrypts the sensitive data of this entity using the provided encryption strategy.
    String
    encrypt(VaultEncryptingStrategy encryptingStrategy)
    Encrypts the sensitive data of this entity using the provided encryption strategy.
    String
    getId()
    Returns a unique identification code based on the object type of the caller instance.
    boolean
    isEncrypted()
    Checks if the information stored in the entity is encrypted or not.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns a unique identification code based on the object type of the caller instance. The allowed codes in the system are:
      • CDC: for cards
      • ACC: for accounts
      A code is allways followed by a number. These numbers are incrementally assigned to each of the instances.
      Returns:
      Unique identification for the caller instance.

    • encrypt

      String encrypt(VaultEncryptingStrategy encryptingStrategy)
      Encrypts the sensitive data of this entity using the provided encryption strategy. The caller instance of VaultObject would result in a Base-64, encrypted version of the entity.
      Parameters:
      encryptingStrategy - the encryption strategy to use
      Returns:
      a human-readable representation of the previous state of the object (for example, its Object.toString() value) before applying encryption.

    • decrypt

      String decrypt(VaultEncryptingStrategy encryptingStrategy)
      Decrypts the sensitive data of this entity using the provided encryption strategy. The caller instance of VaultObject would result in the decrypted version of the entity.

      Warning: the information stored inside the entity, previous to the encryption, MUST be in Base-64

      Parameters:
      encryptingStrategy - the encryption strategy to use; must be compatible with the one used for encrypt(VaultEncryptingStrategy)
      Returns:
      the encrypted representation of the object previous to the process in a Base-64 encoding.

    • isEncrypted

      boolean isEncrypted()
      Checks if the information stored in the entity is encrypted or not.
      Returns:
      True if it's encrypted and false otherwise.
